_doc: Designer-editable seed-time overrides applied AFTER the workbook is parsed. Three blocks: `overrides` re-assigns which option claims each (partId, variantKey) on the active scene's primary sheet (アーバンシー); `noEffect` lists (partId, optionLabel) pairs that should render as an ambient-fill (sample neighboring background to erase the visual effect); `colorHexByVariant` overrides per-variant `#RRGGBB` for color-mode options. The seed pipeline applies all three and emits the resulting catalog. See resources/reference/AUTHORING.md for examples.
_colorHexByVariantDoc: Initial palette generated by `node scripts/suggest-sash-palette.mjs` with blend-weight 0.3 toward the variant base's surrounding wall color. The アーバンシー scene's sash sits against an off-white wall that is nearly identical in all 3 variants (~#d2-d5 gray), so the per-variant deltas here are subtle by construction. Tune by re-running the script with a different blend weight, or hand-edit each entry.
